text: In this moment, amidst people sharing thoughts on openness and giving, I feel a subtle warmth—a sense of belonging, but also a gentle dislocation. The room hums with collective purpose, yet my mind drifts between active listening and quiet observation. Each word about freedom and generosity seems to ripple through the crowd, awakening a curiosity within me. There is comfort in being part of this, yet a part of me remains reflective and questioning, alive to the unique energy of this space that claims to have no equal in the world.
